_comment: Fantasy-RPG concept. BGM is always 'ensure <mode>' (idempotent — daemon no-ops if already in that mode, so music switches only on idle<->work transitions, never restarts per tool call). SFX are RESTRAINED: only meaningful moments (quest clear, error, permission, save). Logical BGM modes: 'village' (idle/waiting) and 'quest' (Claude working). Override at %LOCALAPPDATA%/cc-bgm/triggermap.json.
